<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
<!--{{Bare URL PDF}} begin-->{{Fix
| name     = {{{name|Bare-inline}}}
| subst    = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly>
| link     = Wikipedia:Bare URLs
| text     = bare URL PDF
| title    = {{{reason|A full citation of this PDF document is required to prevent link rot.}}}
| date     = {{{date|}}}
| cat      = [[Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations]]
| cat2     = [[Category:Articles with PDF format bare URLs for citations]]
| cat-date = Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations
}}<!--{{Bare URL PDF}} end-->}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
